site.footer: © 2026 Microsoft Work Summary • Built for quarterly and annual review

overview.title: Build → Win → Scale Mission
overview.description: What I have built is not a series of short-term wins, but a sustainable partner growth engine for AI and Data. This engine integrates strategic focus, conversion mechanisms, solution standardization, and ecosystem expansion into a cohesive system, validated by measurable pipeline, consumption, and revenue outcomes. Ultimately, my core contribution lies in enabling partners to succeed and, through their success, driving scalable and sustained growth while amplifying Microsoft's value across the ecosystem.

profile.name: Charles DENG
profile.title: Senior Partner Solution Architect at Microsoft
profile.summary: Senior Cloud Solutions Architect with 11+ years transforming global enterprise cloud ecosystems. Pioneer in integrating autonomous AI agents and multi-agent orchestration to unify compliance, security, and operational resilience. Delivers high-performance, low-latency multi-cloud architectures with AI-powered self-optimization, driving measurable cost savings and regulatory readiness at scale.

solutionBuild.title: Solution Build summary
solutionBuild.intro: I shifted focus from project execution to capability industrialization. I led the development of 13 standardized AI and Data solution plays, each with clearly defined architectures, deployment models, and value propositions, enabling partners to replicate and deliver consistently. To date, 5 solution offers have been activated.

metrics.label: Standardized AI and Data solution plays

projects.name: Build on ASP and Azure migration
projects.description: Standardized architecture and deployment play for migration-led modernization.

projects.name: DB Insight Platform
projects.description: Data intelligence solution play with clear value proposition and deployment pathway.

projects.name: KnowledgeWiz and internal RAG
projects.description: AI assistant and RAG-ready blueprint for repeatable partner implementation.

projects.name: Ask IT Platform
projects.description: Industrialized IT support scenario with reusable solution components.

projects.name: Automated document processing solution
projects.description: Standardized OCR and document automation play with clear deployment model.

solutionBuild.note: Core shift: from project execution to scalable capability industrialization.

activities.title: Partner enablement and activities
activities.intro: I delivered 16 targeted engagements. These activities anchored in concrete solution architectures, technical pathways, and industry scenarios, ensuring that partners could not only understand the technology but also identify actionable business opportunities.

items.name: Targeted engagement execution
items.description: 16 engagements were executed with solution-and-scenario-driven design, translating technical enablement into concrete business motion.

items.name: Opportunity to customer progression
items.description: The generated opportunities progressed into measurable customer interactions and follow-on engagement tracks.

items.name: Enablement to growth engine
items.description: This approach generated a USD 2.1M pipeline and validated a key shift: when technical enablement is solution- and scenario-driven, it evolves from a cost center into a business generation engine.

next.title: What I will improve next
projectItems: Turn PMX workbook signals into a cleaner delivery health model
Add automated retrospective templates so reviews take less time to assemble
Track the solution-build metrics monthly instead of only at review time
orgItems: Build a reusable knowledge map across programs and activities
Shift activity reporting from attendance to conversion and impact
Use AI tooling to reduce status-reporting overhead

site.title: 工作总结看板
site.footer: © 2026 Microsoft 工作总结 • 适用于季度与年度回顾

overview.title: Build → Win → Scale 使命
overview.description: 我所构建的不是一系列短期胜利，而是 AI 和数据领域的可持续伙伴成长引擎。这个引擎集成了战略聚焦、转化机制、方案标准化和生态拓展，形成了一个有机整体，并由可衡量的 pipeline、消耗和营收成果验证。最终，我的核心贡献在于使伙伴成功，通过他们的成功驱动可扩展和可持续的增长，同时放大 Microsoft 在整个生态中的价值。

profile.name: Charles DENG
profile.title: 微软高级伙伴解决方案架构师
profile.summary: 资深云解决方案架构师，拥有 11 年以上全球企业云生态转型经验。专注将自主 AI Agent 与多智能体协同编排结合，统一合规、安全与运营韧性。可交付高性能、低时延的多云架构，并通过 AI 自优化实现可量化的降本增效与规模化监管就绪。

solutionBuild.title: Solution Build 总结
solutionBuild.intro: 我把工作重心从项目执行转向能力工业化。我主导构建了 13 个标准化 AI 与数据解决方案 play，每个都具备清晰的架构、部署模型和价值主张，帮助伙伴可复制、可持续交付。目前已有 5 个 solution offer 完成 activation。

metrics.label: 标准化 AI 与数据 solution plays
已 activation 的 solution offers

projects.name: Build on ASP 与 Azure 迁移
projects.description: 面向迁移现代化的标准化架构与部署 play。

projects.name: DB Insight Platform
projects.description: 具备清晰价值主张与落地路径的数据智能解决方案 play。

projects.name: KnowledgeWiz 与内部 RAG
projects.description: 可复用的 AI 助手与 RAG 场景化实施蓝图。

projects.name: Ask IT Platform
projects.description: 以标准组件实现 IT 支持场景工业化落地。

projects.name: 自动化文档处理方案
projects.description: 具备清晰部署模型的 OCR 与文档自动化标准化 play。

solutionBuild.note: 核心转变：从项目执行升级为可规模化的能力工业化。

activities.title: 伙伴赋能与组织活动
activities.intro: 我共交付了 16 场有明确目标的赋能活动。这些活动围绕具体方案架构、技术路径和行业场景展开，确保伙伴不只是理解技术，更能识别可执行的业务机会。

items.name: 目标化赋能执行
items.description: 16 场活动以方案和场景为核心设计，把技术赋能直接连接到业务增长动作。

items.name: 机会向客户互动推进
items.description: 生成的机会进一步推进为可跟进、可衡量的客户互动与后续动作。

items.name: 赋能转业务增长引擎
items.description: 活动累计形成 USD 2.1M pipeline，并验证关键转变：当技术赋能以方案与场景驱动时，它会从成本中心转变为业务生成引擎。
items.role: 影响：可持续、可扩展增长

next.title: 下一阶段要继续提升的方向
projectItems: 把 PMX 工作簿信号转成更清晰的交付健康度模型
加入自动化复盘模板，减少整理汇报材料的时间
把 Solution Build 指标改成按月追踪，而不是只在复盘时看一次
orgItems: 沉淀可复用的跨项目知识地图
让活动汇报从参与人数转向转化率与业务影响
用 AI 工具减少状态汇报的重复劳动

site.title: 工作總結看板
site.footer: © 2026 Microsoft 工作總結 • 適用於季度與年度回顧

overview.title: Build → Win → Scale 使命
overview.description: 我所構建的不是一系列短期勝利，而是 AI 和數據領域的可持續夥伴成長引擎。這個引擎集成了戰略聚焦、轉化機制、方案標準化和生態拓展，形成了一個有機整體，並由可衡量的 pipeline、消耗和營收成果驗證。最終，我的核心貢獻在於使夥伴成功，通過他們的成功驅動可擴展和可持續的增長，同時放大 Microsoft 在整個生態中的價值。

profile.name: Charles DENG
profile.title: 微軟高級夥伴解決方案架構師
profile.summary: 資深雲解決方案架構師，擁有 11 年以上全球企業雲生態轉型經驗。專注將自主 AI Agent 與多智能體協同編排整合，統一合規、安全與營運韌性。可交付高效能、低延遲的多雲架構，並透過 AI 自優化實現可量化的成本節省與規模化監管就緒。

solutionBuild.title: Solution Build 總結
solutionBuild.intro: 我把工作重心從專案執行轉向能力工業化。我主導建立了 13 個標準化 AI 與數據解決方案 play，每個都具備清晰的架構、部署模型與價值主張，讓夥伴可複製且穩定交付。目前已有 5 個 solution offer 完成 activation。

activities.title: 夥伴賦能與組織活動
activities.intro: 我共交付了 16 場有明確目標的賦能活動。這些活動圍繞具體方案架構、技術路徑與行業場景展開，確保夥伴不只是理解技術，更能識別可執行的業務機會。

items.name: 目標化賦能執行

items.name: 賦能轉業務增長引擎

items.role: 影響：可持續、可擴展增長
